# ActionBar

A floating action bar component that appears when items are selected, providing contextual bulk actions.

## Import

```jsx
import { ActionBar } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `ActionBar` | The root component that manages action bar state. |
| `ActionBar.Content` | The floating bar containing action buttons. |
| `ActionBar.Positioner` | Controls the positioning of the action bar. |
| `ActionBar.Separator` | A visual separator between action groups. |
| `ActionBar.SelectionTrigger` | Displays the selection count and acts as a toggle. |
| `ActionBar.CloseTrigger` | A button to dismiss the action bar. |

## Props

### ActionBar

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `open` | `boolean` | - | Controlled open state of the action bar. |
| `onOpenChange` | `(details: { open: boolean }) => void` | - | Callback when the open state changes. |
| `placement` | `string` | `"bottom"` | The placement of the floating action bar. |
| `closeOnInteractOutside` | `boolean` | `true` | Whether the action bar closes when clicking outside. |

## Usage

### Basic Action Bar

```jsx
function SelectableList() {
  const [selected, setSelected] = useState([]);

  return (
    <>
      {/* List items with selection logic */}

      <ActionBar open={selected.length > 0}>
        <ActionBar.Positioner>
          <ActionBar.Content>
            <ActionBar.SelectionTrigger>
              {selected.length} selected
            </ActionBar.SelectionTrigger>
            <ActionBar.Separator />
            <Button size="sm" variant="outline">Delete</Button>
            <Button size="sm" variant="outline">Move</Button>
            <Button size="sm" variant="outline">Archive</Button>
            <ActionBar.CloseTrigger />
          </ActionBar.Content>
        </ActionBar.Positioner>
      </ActionBar>
    </>
  );
}
```

### Action Bar with Groups

```jsx
<ActionBar open={hasSelection}>
  <ActionBar.Positioner>
    <ActionBar.Content>
      <ActionBar.SelectionTrigger>
        {count} items selected
      </ActionBar.SelectionTrigger>
      <ActionBar.Separator />
      <Button size="sm">Export</Button>
      <Button size="sm">Share</Button>
      <ActionBar.Separator />
      <Button size="sm" colorPalette="red">Delete</Button>
      <ActionBar.CloseTrigger />
    </ActionBar.Content>
  </ActionBar.Positioner>
</ActionBar>
```
